sections.paragraph:
Original: הוּם

Transliteration: hûm

Phonetic: hoom

BDB Definition:

  1. to distract, ring again, make a (great) noise, murmur, roar, discomfit, be moved
    1. (Qal) to discomfit
    2. (Niphal) to be in a stir
    3. (Hiphil)
      1. to murmur
      2. to show disquietude

Origin: a primitive root [compare H2000]

TWOT entry: 486

Part(s) of speech: Verb
